name: synapse-devtools
description: Synapse DevTools - Browser extension for debugging Synapse state management

scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/*.html src/*.css manifest.json dist/ && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp icons/* dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Icons copied'
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run watch
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../synapse-devtools.zip .
